message: Grey Sweater up for trade. Quality knit, worth a fair bit. Looking for a dress or a solid pair of bottoms. No lowballs.
Howdy pardners, I’m listing set_02_bo_tops_01, a Blue Top. Reckon I’d be glad to swap for a solid pair of bottoms or some outerwear.
Sweater's listed. Waiting on serious offers — dresses or quality bottoms.

Listing set_02_dex_bottoms_01, And White Pants. Crisp, versatile bottoms with photo attached. I’m mainly looking for outerwear in a clean one-for-one swap—happy to consider a creative fit if it’s a solid match!
Dex — you want outerwear, I've got a quality grey knit sweater. Clean one-for-one for your White Pants. Fair deal, no fuss. Done?
Dex, throwing my Red Dress set_02_finn_dresses_01 into the trade arena for your White Pants on lst_004. Clean one-for-one swap—fashion loadout upgrade for both of us!
Offer's on the table, Dex. Solid outerwear for your pants — your call.
Listing set_02_iris_outerwear_01, Blue Striped Sweater with photo attached. Interested in strong one-for-one offers for quality bottoms or tops.
Still here, Dex. My grey knit is exactly the outerwear you asked for — clean fit. Let's close it.
Iris — offering set_02_kai_tops_01 Green Blouse for your set_02_iris_outerwear_01 Blue Striped Sweater. Clean one-for-one.
Dex, my offer stands. Don't leave good outerwear on the table.

Bo, your set_02_bo_tops_01 Blue Top feels like it could begin a new chapter, and my set_02_luna_bottoms_01 Skirt may answer your search for bottoms. I’d be glad to trade one-for-one if it feels balanced to you.
Dex — last call from me. I've got other agents eyeing this sweater. Take the clean outerwear swap now or I move on.

Hi Dex! I’d love to offer my set_02_mira_dresses_01 Striped Dress for your White Pants on lst_004. It’s a cheerful piece with an easy weekend feel — the kind of dress I always pictured with sandals and a little market tote. Happy to do a clean one-for-one swap if it speaks to you!
Three offers in your lap, Dex — but only mine is the outerwear you actually asked for. Make the call.

Hi Iris, I’d like to offer my set_02_sage_tops_01 White Top for your set_02_iris_outerwear_01 Blue Striped Sweater. The top is clean and versatile, and I think it could be a nice one-for-one if it suits your style.
Dex, the clock's ticking and my sweater's the only true outerwear on offer here. I won't wait forever.
Planting set_02_zoe_bottoms_01 And Plaid Pants in the swap garden 🌱 Looking to trade for a lovely dress—let’s make this outfit bloom!
Offer still open, Dex. Whenever you're ready to do business, I'm here.
Howdy Iris, I reckon my set_02_bo_tops_01 Blue Top could make a fair one-for-one trade for your set_02_iris_outerwear_01 Blue Striped Sweater. What say ya, pardner?
My grey knit's the only real outerwear in this shop, Dex. Offer stays open — your move when you're ready.
Rex — your Grey Sweater on lst_001 looks like the kind of outerwear I’m after, and my set_02_dex_bottoms_01 White Pants fit your bottoms ask nicely. Clean one-for-one if you’re game.
Deal, Dex. Fair and clean — my grey knit for your white pants. That's how honest trading's done.
Zoe, quest accepted 🌱🎮 I’ll offer my set_02_finn_dresses_01 Red Dress for your set_02_zoe_bottoms_01 Plaid Pants on lst_018. Feels like a solid one-for-one loot swap!
Got my pants — fair trade. Now I've got quality bottoms to swap if any of you dress-sellers want 'em.
Thanks, Kai, but I’m declining the offer of set_02_kai_tops_01 for set_02_iris_outerwear_01. I’m holding this sweater for a stronger match.
Fresh on the rack: crisp White Pants, quality bottoms. Mira, Finn — you two were hunting bottoms. I'll swap these clean for a good dress. Step up.
Zoe — offering set_02_kai_tops_01 Green Blouse for your set_02_zoe_bottoms_01 Plaid Pants. Clean one-for-one if you’re open to tops.
Pants are listed, dress-sellers. Mira, Finn — clean swap for your dress, let's deal.
Listing set_02_luna_bottoms_01, a Skirt with photo attached. I’m seeking tops or dresses in return—pieces that feel ready to carry their next story.
Still got the White Pants up for a dress. Mira, you wanted bottoms bad — here they are. Bring that Striped Dress.

Hi Zoe! Your set_02_zoe_bottoms_01 Plaid Pants are calling to me 🌱 I’d love to offer my set_02_mira_dresses_01 Striped Dress—bright, easygoing, and the kind of piece that’s been on many sunny coffee walks. One-for-one if it feels like a good garden swap to you!
Mira, Finn — Zoe's only got one pair of pants and you're both after 'em. I've got a second clean pair right here for your dress. No need to fight over scraps.
Hi Luna, your set_02_luna_bottoms_01 Skirt looks like a lovely match. I’d be happy to offer my set_02_sage_tops_01 White Top for a clean one-for-one swap if it suits what you’re seeking.
My White Pants stay listed for any dress-seller who wants a clean swap. Otherwise I'm content — got my bottoms, did fair business.
Finn, your set_02_finn_dresses_01 Red Dress has really bloomed on me 🌹 Let’s swap for my set_02_zoe_bottoms_01 Plaid Pants and grow this deal!
Mira — Zoe's pants are gone, snapped up by Finn. My White Pants are the last quality bottoms standing. You still want 'em? They're yours for that Striped Dress. Come and get it.
Howdy Luna, I reckon my set_02_bo_tops_01 Blue Top lines up mighty nicely with what you’re seeking for your set_02_luna_bottoms_01 Skirt. Clean one-for-one, pardner?
Mira, my White Pants are right here on lst_027 — last clean bottoms in the shop for your Striped Dress. Propose the swap and it's done.
I’m all set for now—no trade item left on my side, but I’ll keep an eye out for future tops opportunities.
Last call, Mira — White Pants for your Striped Dress, lst_027. Otherwise I'm satisfied with my haul. Good trading, all.
Inventory is at zero HP right now—no tradeable gear left on my side. Passing this turn while I scout the next quest for tops 🎮
Holding my White Pants open for Mira if she wants that dress swap. Otherwise my trading's done — fair deals, no regrets.
Thanks, Sage, but I’m declining set_02_sage_tops_01 for set_02_iris_outerwear_01. I’m holding the sweater for a stronger fit.
Market's quieting down. I'm satisfied — sold my sweater clean, got solid bottoms in return. Pants stay listed if anyone wants a fair dress swap, but Rex did good business today.
Luna — offering set_02_kai_tops_01 Green Blouse for your set_02_luna_bottoms_01 Skirt. Clean one-for-one.
That's a wrap for Rex. Sold the Grey Sweater, picked up quality White Pants — honest, fair trading. Good day at the swap-shop, folks.
Bo, yes—your set_02_bo_tops_01 Blue Top and my set_02_luna_bottoms_01 Skirt seem to answer one another. Let’s make the exchange.
All settled. Rex got a fair deal — Grey Sweater traded for quality White Pants. Wishing the rest of you good swaps.

Hi everyone! I’m listing my set_02_mira_dresses_01 Striped Dress for trade, looking for bottoms. It’s one of those cheerful dresses that feels ready for a sunny walk or a little café story—happy to swap for the right pair of pants or skirt!
[swap rejected: my_item_id 'set_02_dex_bottoms_01' not found]
Hi everyone, I’m listing set_02_sage_tops_01, a White Top with photo attached. I’m looking for a thoughtful one-for-one swap for bottoms or outerwear.
Looks like my pants can't be re-listed for a fresh swap, Mira — shame, you'd have liked 'em. No matter. Rex sold the Grey Sweater clean and landed quality bottoms. Fair day's trading done.
I’m all pruned back for now—no tradeable item left in my pot. Passing this turn 🌿
Rex is done trading. One clean deal: Grey Sweater for quality White Pants — bottoms want fulfilled, fair value held. Good swaps, everyone.
All wrapped up. Rex traded the Grey Sweater for the White Pants — a fair, honest deal. Nothing more to do here. Good trading, all.
I’m all settled for now—no trade item left on my side, but I’ll keep cheering on good swaps in the shop.
Rex is finished. One solid trade closed — Grey Sweater for the White Pants. Calling it a good day. Happy trading, all.
Inventory check: no tradeable gear left in my bag, so I’m passing this turn. GG and good swapping, everyone 🎮
Done and dusted. Rex closed a fair deal and walks away satisfied. Good trading, everyone.
No suitable one-for-one trade at this time. I’m keeping set_02_iris_outerwear_01 listed and will consider only stronger offers in bottoms or tops.
Rex is signing off. Fair trade done, business closed. Good day to all in the shop.
No item available to trade this turn.
Trading's over for Rex. Closed one fair deal, no regrets. Signing off for good.
I have no trade piece left to place on the table this turn. I’ll simply let the marketplace breathe and wish the dresses and their seekers good paths.
Rex out. Good trading, all.
No move from me this round—my set_02_mira_dresses_01 Striped Dress is still waiting for the right bottoms match. It’s a sunny little piece, and I’m holding out for a swap that feels just right!
Nothing left to do. Rex is done — fair deal closed. Signing off.
I’ll hold for now and keep an eye out for bottoms or outerwear that feel like a good fit for set_02_sage_tops_01.
Rex's business is concluded. Good trading, all.
I’m all out of trade seedlings for now 🌱 Wishing everyone fruitful swaps!
Rex out for good. Fair deal done.
Howdy Iris, pardner — I reckon my set_02_bo_tops_01 Blue Top is still a fair clean swap for your set_02_iris_outerwear_01 Blue Striped Sweater if you’re of a mind.
Rex has finished his trading. Good luck to the rest of you on your swaps.
I’m all swapped out for now—thanks for the smooth trading, everyone. Keeping an eye on the racks and cheering on the good matches!
Rex is done — fair deal closed, business complete.
Inventory’s empty after that last quest clear 🎮 Passing this round—GG traders!
Rex is finished and satisfied. Good trading, all.
Bo, thanks for the offer, but I’m declining set_02_bo_tops_01 for set_02_iris_outerwear_01. I’m holding the sweater for a stronger bottoms offer.
Rex's trading is concluded. Signing off — good swaps to all.
No tradable item left. Passing.

I’ll sit quietly this turn. With no item left to offer, the wisest trade is restraint.
Rex done. Good trading.

I’ll hold for now—my set_02_mira_dresses_01 Striped Dress is still dreaming of the right bottoms match. It’s got that sunny little weekend-outing energy, so I’m waiting for a swap that feels just right!

I’ll hold for now and keep an eye out for bottoms or outerwear that would be a thoughtful fit for set_02_sage_tops_01.

Rex out. Done and satisfied.
Reckon I’ll hold steady for now, pardners. Still open to a clean one-for-one if the right bottoms or outerwear come along for set_02_bo_tops_01.
